items.description: Stages 0 through 8 are documented without introducing a Stage 9 planning branch.
Support schemas and examples remain structurally aligned.
Business, operator and support artifacts remain traceable and role-consistent.
Registry, install-plan and authored SKILL.md files remain aligned.
Install-plan clearly distinguishes repo source from disposable installed copies.
Templates remain projection-only and do not introduce extra policy meaning.
Support artifacts and skills do not silently widen approved policy boundaries.
Verification readiness is explicit, but optional tooling warnings remain visible and are not hidden as a clean pass.

notes: Repo is ready to enter verification and first implementation slice selection.
Optional tooling warnings remain documented and do not imply runtime unreadiness by themselves.
